sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_rdf (id INT PRIMARY KEY, uri VARCHAR(255), value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_rdf (id, uri, value) VALUES (1, 'foaf:knows', 'some value'), (2, 'no-namespace-prefix-iri', 'another value');
SELECT __xml_nsexpand_iristr(uri) || ' is a valid QName!' AS full_uri FROM test_rdf WHERE uri LIKE 'foaf:%';
INSERT INTO test_rdf (id, uri, value) VALUES (3, 'http://example.com/resource', 'yet another value');
SELECT __xml_nsexpand_iristr(uri || ':local') AS expanded_uri FROM test_rdf WHERE id = 3;
SELECT __xml_nsexpand_iristr(CONCAT('foaf:', id)) AS expanded_qname FROM test_rdf WHERE id IN (1, 2);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT __xml_nsexpand_iristr(CONCAT(uri, ':additional')) AS uri_expanded FROM test_rdf) AS expanded_uri WHERE uri_expanded LIKE '%knows%';
SELECT __xml_nsexpand_iristr(NULLIF(uri, 'no-namespace-prefix-iri')) || ' has been processed' FROM test_rdf WHERE id = 2;
SELECT * FROM test_rdf WHERE __xml_nsexpand_iristr(CONCAT('foaf:', value)) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT __xml_nsexpand_iristr(CONCAT('foaf:', 'knows')) AS valid_qname FROM test_rdf) AS derived_table GROUP BY valid_qname HAVING COUNT(*) > 0;
